ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You do not have an internet connection, and the Lexicon dictionary cannot be downloaded. Please restore your internet connection and restart Obsidian
ast.target: 您没有网络连接，Lexicon 词典无法下载。请恢复网络连接并重启 Obsidian

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lexicon dictionary is being downloaded, this may take a few minutes. This message will disappear when the process is complete.
ast.target: Lexicon 词典正在下载，可能需要几分钟。完成后此消息将消失。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The Lexicon dictionary file is not currently available for download. Please try again later.
ast.target: Lexicon 词典文件目前无法下载。请稍后再试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Dictionary is still loading. Please try again in a moment.
ast.target: 词典仍在加载中。请稍后再试。
